assumptions: The new surface is a top-level tab named Models, not a sub-tab inside Domains or Analysis
First version does not include a summary strip above the matrix
Each main matrix cell shows pooled win rate as the primary number
Cross-domain stability signal uses five dots with half-dot support
Domain appears as filter, count, and drilldown — not as main page structure
Stability means how similar the value win rate stays across domains, not test-retest repeatability
Models tab uses standard layout width (no fullWidth) with abbreviated column headers
NavTabs: Models is a plain NavLink like Status, not a dropdown menu
discovery.summary: Full spec exists at docs/models-tab-spec.md. No open questions. Requirements are stable. Discovery complete.
acceptance_criteria: Stability explanation can be understood without statistical background

parallel_analysis.note: Three sequential slices (A→B→C) with hard dependencies: Slice B depends on Slice A (API types must exist for codegen), Slice C depends on Slice B (routing must exist for UI). No safe parallelism.
